## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX to discuss integration pages, developer content, and next steps for collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages are progressing well; Webflow will set up a custom CMS collection for GrowthX to publish content](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Developer content writing style and authorship discussed; Luke's writing style will be used as initial reference](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
  - [Analytics tracking and content approval process to be proposed by GrowthX for efficient scaling](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

## Topics

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [9 out of 20 integration pages reviewed and approved by Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Custom CMS collection to be set up next week for GrowthX to publish content](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Templates expected to be finished by end of July](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [DevRel team to do quick advocacy checks for approval](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### Content Structure and Design

  - [Categories and integration types to be flexible; GrowthX to provide implementation notes](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Concerns raised about using company logos/marks; legal team to be consulted](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - ["Learn More" CTA to be removed or replaced as needed](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Brand logos in top fold to be reconsidered due to potential confusion](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

### Content Generation and Review Process

  - [GrowthX can generate 100+ integration pages quickly](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
  - [Webflow team can review 10-15 pages per week](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose a streamlined approval process (potentially using Airtable) for async work](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

### Analytics and Data Access

  - [GrowthX to outline analytics needs and goals](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Webflow uses Intellivize (their own analytics tool); direct access may be challenging](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Potential for GrowthX to add their own pixel/tracking to pages being explored](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

### Developer Content Authorship

  - [Developer content should have individual authors for authenticity](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=2577.0)
  - [Luke's writing style document shared as initial reference](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Exploration of AI fine-tuning to match different DevRel team members' writing styles](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [Reddit/Hacker News tier content should come from named individuals](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=2571.0)

### AI-Assisted Content Creation

  - [GrowthX using GPT models (likely GPT-4) for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [Luke experimenting with local AI tools (e.g., Cursor) for developer content](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Discussion on potential fine-tuning of AI models to match specific writing styles](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide implementation notes for integration pages (categories, types, suggested content logic)](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Webflow to set up custom CMS collection for integrations](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose analytics tracking and content approval process](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [GrowthX to experiment with Luke's writing style for developer content](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
  - [Further discussions needed on developer content authorship and AI fine-tuning](https://fathom.video/share/aCZX1yNRMEm3VFrMZ-Pyo7_pWz68b_Wj?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
